concerns.text: The 'Assumption about dataset-variable fit' block contains a Functional Requirement ('System MUST utilize existing public IAT datasets... If a selected dataset lacks... system MUST automatically generate synthetic background stimuli...'). This requirement has no corresponding User Story (US-1, US-2, US-3) and no explicit anchor (e.g., 'See US-X'). It describes a data generation fallback mechanism not covered by the current story set, creating an orphaned requirement.

FR-007 ('System MUST perform a sensitivity analysis sweeping the complexity threshold cutoff...') is anchored to US-3. However, US-3 (Statistical Analysis) only explicitly mentions performing a repeated-measures ANOVA and generating a visualization. It does not mention the specific requirement of a 'sensitivity analysis sweep' of thresholds. While US-3 is the closest match, the scope of the story does not clearly cover the specific 'sweep' logic described in FR-007, risking a weak anchor. Consider explicitly adding the sensitivity analysis to US-3's scope or creating a dedicated story for robustness checks.
